items.title: Trump’s Unhinged Attacks on the Smithsonian
items.summary: The White House accuses the public institution of “extreme activism”; plus, an interview with queer icon Carmelita Tropicana.

items.title: Trump Accuses Smithsonian of “Anti-White Activism” in Draconian New Report
items.summary: The White House’s 162-page document claims museum leadership has promoted "extreme political activism."

items.title: The Met Museum's Staff Have Some Thoughts About the Art
items.summary: A new book gathers essays by the museum’s curators, researchers, librarians, and conservators on everything from Renaissance portraiture to the work of Wendy Red Star.

items.title: Carmelita Tropicana Was Born Out of the Closet
items.summary: Hyperallergic spoke with artist Alina Troyano about lesbian performance in 1980s Lower East Side, satirizing stereotypes, and embodying her iconic alter ego.
